name: ghost-zoro-grand-line-tcg
description: Private password-gated Unity WebGL game and research workspace for Ghost x Zoro One Piece TCG strategy.

scripts.install:verify: node -v && npm -v && ffmpeg -version | head -n 1 && npx hyperframes@latest --version
scripts.render:stills: remotion still src/index.ts GhostZoroVideo out/stills/market.png --frame=2400 && remotion still src/index.ts GhostZoroVideo out/stills/portfolio.png --frame=4200 && remotion still src/index.ts GhostZoroVideo out/stills/action.png --frame=8500
scripts.qa:workspace: npm run validate:data && npm run pii:scan && npm run build:wrapper
